name: antigravity-subagent
description: Delegate coding work to a monitored Antigravity CLI session.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate coding to a monitored agy session
interface.longDescription: Runs Antigravity through a headless ACP adapter with separate model and effort controls, silent standby, completion wake-ups, and bounded watchdog reviews.
defaultPrompt: Delegate this coding task to Antigravity
